name: Summer Spaghetti with Gazpacho Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti in boiling water with bay leaf and salt until just tender. Drain well, discard bay leaf, mix with oil and garlic, and chill.
2. Mince half the cucumber, onion, and pepper; reserve.
3. Mince one of the tomatoes and reserve.
4. Place the remaining tomatoes in a blender or food processor with vinegar, basil, oregano, thyme, minced nasturtium blossoms, and saffron. Puree.
5. Add the remaining cucumber, onion, and pepper, and pulse several times to chop coarsely.
6. Stir in sherry and add salt to taste.
7. Mix the sauce with spaghetti. Divide into four bowls and sprinkle each serving with minced tomato, cucumber, onion, and pepper.
8. Garnish each serving with 3 chive leaves, several chive blossoms, and a nasturtium blossom.
